system.flavor: The real trick is being one step ahead of trouble.
system.effect:
Effect gain evasion and one use of the following interrupt until the start of your next turn:

[Trick — Interrupt]
Trigger foe targets you with an ability.
Effect [X]: Swap places with a character in range after the ability resolves.
Gambit [X]: (1-3) The ability deals +3 damage to you (4-5) gain stealth (6): gain stealth, and the ability deals 1/2 damage to you.
